title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Graduate School

Announcements

Information

20
						February

2023

As a result of the online meeting which was joined by the Head of YÖK and all the rectors, education method has gained clarity.

In this context, with the decision of the Senate of our University, it was decided to continue Spring Semestre through online education. Our dormitories and libraries will continue to serve during Spring Semestre.

The 4th, 5th and 6th grade students of the Faculty of Medicine, the 4th and 5th grade students of the Faculty of Dentistry, the 4th grade students of the Faculty of Health Sciences, Nursing Department, and the students who took the teaching practice course will do their practical training face-to-face. In addition to this, internship and workplace trainings PROMES and O'COOP will be held face to face.

Applied courses( including happy life courses) are postponed till further notice.

Gratitudes for our students’ understanding.
